summary: Frontend-only testing of Match Majesty (Next.js prototype) at /match-majesty. All requested flows verified successfully: title screen, game board, HUD, resources, objective panel, swap+match gameplay (moves 25->24, score reached 75), Map navigation, Town navigation (4 cards + Aurelius), Retry reset (score=0, moves=25), Settings modal with toggles + close. No JS errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testid attributes are present and used correctly across screens.
Settings modal correctly exposes both top close (X) and bottom CLOSE button as expected by spec.
Board renders all 6 gem types (ruby/sapphire/emerald/topaz/amethyst/pearl) with distinct shapes/colors.
Score visually lags behind moves decrement briefly during cascade animation; not a defect but worth noting for animation timing tests.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth, pure frontend prototype
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 acceptance criteria verified via Playwright at 1920x800. Title -> Play -> Game (64 gem cells, 6 gem types, all resources/HUD/objective testids), valid swap registered (moves 25->24, eventual score 75 confirms cascade resolved), nav-map shows Map with Dawn of the Cascade + Start + Back, nav-town shows 4 cards (rune-words, capsule-clash, shop, upgrades) + Aurelius + Back, retry resets state, settings modal opens with sound/music toggles + reset + close (modal dismisses correctly). No console errors. Screenshots saved.
